betterquesting:10.desc:8:
Precision, accuracy, patience, dedication.
Order, exmplified in the facets of a crystal cut beautifully.
And yet, each crystal is unique, and the art is to explot the uniqueness, to value it, so that it can flourish.
The art of taking raw beauty, and to polish it, while maintaining originality.
A process that considers the smallest detail with the utmost care. The whole made out of details.
The art of the Arbiter, missing, but now being brought back.
